## Verification

- [ ] `uv run ruff check modules/`
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check modules/`
- [ ] `uv run python -m pyright`
- [ ] `uv run python -m pytest`
- [ ] `uv run python scripts/sync_modules.py --check`
- [ ] `cd _mcp_server && npm run build:dist`
- [ ] `cd _mcp_server && npm run lint`
- [ ] `cd _mcp_server && npm test`
